name: National Credit Educational Services
description_short: National Credit Education Services offers credit repair and financial coaching, claiming to help customers achieve 30-150+ point credit score increases through dispute resolution and credit education over 15+ years in business.
description_long:
National Credit Education Services is a credit repair and financial education company that has been operating for over 15 years. The company positions itself as a hybrid service combining traditional credit dispute resolution with financial coaching and educational resources. According to their website, they have assisted 1,493,678 customers and claim an average credit score increase of 30-150+ points.

Their core service involves obtaining and analyzing all three credit reports (TransUnion, Equifax, and Experian), disputing errors and negative items across all bureaus, and providing monthly progress tracking through a client dashboard. They also offer personalized credit coaching sessions to help customers set financial goals, review credit status, and develop improvement strategies. The company provides educational resources on credit management, debt reduction, and financial health, positioning themselves as educators as much as repair specialists.

What distinguishes National Credit Education Services is their 90-day satisfaction guarantee with a full refund if services don't meet expectations within that window. They emphasize transparency with real-time dashboard access, monthly progress updates, and claim high approval rates for subsequent credit applications (88% for auto loans, 71% for home loans, 81% for new credit, 75% for refinancing). Their pricing structure includes tiered plans, though specific pricing details are not fully visible on the provided website content.

However, potential customers should note several limitations: The website contains minimal specific information about pricing, dispute methodology, or detailed service processes. Customer testimonials are limited to three brief reviews. The company's approval rate claims for subsequent loans appear to be based on customer surveys rather than independent verification. Like all credit repair companies, they cannot remove accurate negative information—only dispute errors and inaccuracies. The website also indicates it is "being upgraded," suggesting ongoing development.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 90-day satisfaction guarantee with full refund promise
Works on all three credit reports simultaneously (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Offers personalized one-on-one credit coaching alongside dispute services
Real-time dashboard access with monthly progress tracking and activity logs
Over 15 years of claimed operating history and experience
Includes comprehensive credit education resources and financial guidance
Free initial credit evaluation and consultation
cons: Website indicates ongoing upgrades and lacks detailed service methodology transparency
Pricing information is not fully displayed or explained on available website pages
Only three customer testimonials provided; approval rate statistics lack independent verification
Cannot remove accurate negative items—limited to disputing errors and inaccuracies per FTC regulations
Contact information limited to phone number and generic gmail address; no physical business address listed
best_for: Consumers with multiple credit report errors seeking comprehensive dispute resolution
People who want ongoing financial coaching alongside credit repair services
Those seeking educational resources to understand and improve credit habits long-term
Individuals preparing for major financial decisions (home/auto loans) within 3-6 months
diagnosis: National Credit Education Services is best for consumers who want both credit repair dispute services and financial coaching, particularly those preparing for major lending decisions within 90 days and seeking transparency through real-time dashboard tracking. The main caveat is that their website lacks transparent pricing and detailed methodology information, and like all credit repair services, they can only dispute inaccurate items—not remove accurate negative information regardless of how damaging.
services: Credit report analysis and review across all three bureaus
Dispute filing for errors and inaccurate negative items
Financial goal setting and strategy development
Client dashboard with real-time score and report updates
Credit education resources and learning library
Access to all three credit scores and reports
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
